## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss potential content marketing partnership between fwd.digital and hypermode.com](https://fathom.video/share/cYKuSgFZUJYjSgvNELNwbBfDzvNuPG8T?tab=summary&timestamp=5.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Hypermode acquired DGRF assets, aiming to migrate/deprecate DGRF website within 30 days](https://fathom.video/share/cYKuSgFZUJYjSgvNELNwbBfDzvNuPG8T?tab=summary&timestamp=1581.0)
  - [Jessica seeks expertise on content generation, SEO strategy, and leveraging existing DGRF authority](https://fathom.video/share/cYKuSgFZUJYjSgvNELNwbBfDzvNuPG8T?tab=summary&timestamp=509.0)
  - [fwd.digital offers flexible partnership options, including content creation, SEO, and migration advisory](https://fathom.video/share/cYKuSgFZUJYjSgvNELNwbBfDzvNuPG8T?tab=summary&timestamp=635.0)
  - [Next steps: Marcel to send proposal (SOW) and research outputs, add Jessica to Slack for collaboration](https://fathom.video/share/cYKuSgFZUJYjSgvNELNwbBfDzvNuPG8T?tab=summary&timestamp=1314.0)

## Topics

### Hypermode's Current Situation and Needs

  - [Recently acquired DGRF assets, aiming to deprecate DGRF website in 30 days](https://fathom.video/share/cYKuSgFZUJYjSgvNELNwbBfDzvNuPG8T?tab=summary&timestamp=1581.0)
  - [Light on content, seeking to accelerate content creation and SEO strategy](https://fathom.video/share/cYKuSgFZUJYjSgvNELNwbBfDzvNuPG8T?tab=summary&timestamp=1820.0)
  - [Target personas: ML engineers/data teams moving AI to production, traditional app developers integrating LLMs](https://fathom.video/share/cYKuSgFZUJYjSgvNELNwbBfDzvNuPG8T?tab=summary&timestamp=1992.0)
  - [Current resources: One contractor for technical writing, newly hired head of design, Will Wachan for developer community](https://fathom.video/share/cYKuSgFZUJYjSgvNELNwbBfDzvNuPG8T?tab=summary&timestamp=2374.0)

### fwd.digital's Offerings and Approach

  - [Work streams: Editorial/content refresh, programmatic SEO, link building](https://fathom.video/share/cYKuSgFZUJYjSgvNELNwbBfDzvNuPG8T?tab=summary&timestamp=1424.0)
  - [12-week engagement process: Research, kickoff, strategy, calibration, publishing](https://fathom.video/share/cYKuSgFZUJYjSgvNELNwbBfDzvNuPG8T?tab=summary&timestamp=1640.0)
  - [AI-powered content creation workflow with human editing and fact-checking](https://fathom.video/share/cYKuSgFZUJYjSgvNELNwbBfDzvNuPG8T?tab=summary&timestamp=1640.0)
  - [Flexible to adapt services based on Hypermode's specific needs](https://fathom.video/share/cYKuSgFZUJYjSgvNELNwbBfDzvNuPG8T?tab=summary&timestamp=1640.0)

### Website Migration Considerations

  - [DGRF has 40,000 backlinks and established authority since 2016](https://fathom.video/share/cYKuSgFZUJYjSgvNELNwbBfDzvNuPG8T?tab=summary&timestamp=1032.0)
  - [Options: Full migration, partial migration with authority transfer, or building Hypermode from scratch](https://fathom.video/share/cYKuSgFZUJYjSgvNELNwbBfDzvNuPG8T?tab=summary&timestamp=1099.0)
  - [Marcel recommends refreshing high-traffic DGRF content, redirecting to Hypermode, and focusing on new content/link building for Hypermode](https://fathom.video/share/cYKuSgFZUJYjSgvNELNwbBfDzvNuPG8T?tab=summary&timestamp=1032.0)

### Content Strategy Recommendations

  - [Focus on jobs-to-be-done and specific pain points for target personas](https://fathom.video/share/cYKuSgFZUJYjSgvNELNwbBfDzvNuPG8T?tab=summary&timestamp=2202.0)
  - [Combine broader app dev content with ML-specific topics to capture audience](https://fathom.video/share/cYKuSgFZUJYjSgvNELNwbBfDzvNuPG8T?tab=summary&timestamp=2202.0)
  - [Leverage thought leadership from Kevin and Ryan through efficient content creation processes](https://fathom.video/share/cYKuSgFZUJYjSgvNELNwbBfDzvNuPG8T?tab=summary&timestamp=2253.0)
  - [Create both introductory/101 content and in-depth technical guides](https://fathom.video/share/cYKuSgFZUJYjSgvNELNwbBfDzvNuPG8T?tab=summary&timestamp=2289.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Marcel to send SOW (Statement of Work) proposal](https://fathom.video/share/cYKuSgFZUJYjSgvNELNwbBfDzvNuPG8T?tab=summary&timestamp=2426.0)
  - [Marcel to run research workflow on Hypermode and share outputs](https://fathom.video/share/cYKuSgFZUJYjSgvNELNwbBfDzvNuPG8T?tab=summary&timestamp=2307.0)
  - [Marcel to add Jessica to Slack channel for ongoing communication](https://fathom.video/share/cYKuSgFZUJYjSgvNELNwbBfDzvNuPG8T?tab=summary&timestamp=2314.0)
  - [Jessica to review proposal and research, considering DGRF migration strategy](https://fathom.video/share/cYKuSgFZUJYjSgvNELNwbBfDzvNuPG8T?tab=summary&timestamp=2330.0)
  - [Discuss potential February 17th kickoff date (earliest available for fwd.digital)](https://fathom.video/share/cYKuSgFZUJYjSgvNELNwbBfDzvNuPG8T?tab=summary&timestamp=2438.0)
